content: These famous last words were spoken by Marie Antoinette, the Queen of France, on the eve of her execution by guillotine during the French Revolution on October 16, 1793. She reportedly said these words to her executioner before being led to her death at the Place de la Révolution in Paris.
raw_content: These famous last words were spoken by Marie Antoinette, the Queen of France, on the eve of her execution by guillotine during the French Revolution on October 16, 1793. She reportedly said these words to her executioner before being led to her death at the Place de la Révolution in Paris.
